name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 50% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$167.7800. Trade idea: entry A$168.9000, stop A$137.7387, target A$194.3136 (0.82:1) — then trail it.
